name: com.wingmanprotocol/agent-gateway
description: 15 deterministic construction & finance calculators for AI agents (mortgage, concrete, framing, contractor markup, draw schedules, and more) — ground-truth math, not LLM guesses. MCP-native. Free to try: 500 calls/month with an API key, no signup. Pay-per-call via x402 (USDC on Base), sovereign self-settled — no third-party facilitator.
